design_philosophy: Fusion of health and wealth. The design must feel athletic and precise. No generic centered 'SaaS' layouts. High asymmetry, massive negative space, and functional color coding.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Minimum section padding py-24. Component padding p-8 or p-12.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Never perfectly symmetrical. Mix span-4, span-8 sizes. Leave negative space.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use 1px solid border-zinc-200 to separate sections instead of relying solely on shadows. (Grid Borders - The Technical Look)

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white font-bold rounded-none px-8 py-4 hover:bg-orange-500 transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-300 font-bold rounded-none px-8 py-4 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors duration-300

cards.style: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-none p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(24,24,27,1)] transition-all duration-300
cards.note: Neo-brutalist touch for high energy and performance feel.

ui_components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-zinc-200. Left-aligned logo, right-aligned links.
ui_components.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Textarea/Button. Customize to have rounded-none, border-zinc-300, and focus:border-zinc-900 focus:ring-0.

image_urls.description: Hero section background: Dynamic runner silhouetted against sunrise.
Finance section visual: Modern workspace with laptop and charts.
Fitness section visual: Man jogging on a path.
Wellness section visual: Freshly sliced oranges on a wooden board.
Abstract colorful gradient for blog thumbnails or accent banners.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio. Avoid white text on yellow or light orange.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations should be swift (duration-300 or less).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-btn', data-testid='nav-finance-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts import into index.css or the main HTML head.
Configure Tailwind font families: sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], display: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'].

Build standard marketing structures using HTML/Tailwind, rely on Shadcn UI only for interactive logic (Forms, Dialogs, Select). Do not use Shadcn Card if it restricts the Neo-brutalist hover effect defined.
HERO SECTION: Must be asymmetrical. E.g., Massive text block on the left taking up 8 columns, with the runner image taking up the right 4 columns, or a full bleed with a robust overlay.
Implement distinct pages: Home, Fitness, Finance, Wellness, Blog, Contact using React Router.
SECTIONS: Use color coding carefully. A fitness challenge card could have an orange accent line. A budgeting tip card gets an emerald accent line.
Do not center-align the main headings. Left-align for strong optical structure.
Use framer-motion for simple staggered reveals on scroll, ensuring the 'Grid Item' rule is followed (motion.div as the direct grid child).
